_description: Append-only history of demo cases generated by Claude for walkthrough runs. Each entry is a case that has been used at least once so Claude can avoid repeating names, eval types, and jurisdictions on subsequent runs.
_rules: Avoid reusing an (evalType, jurisdiction) pair within the most recent 5 entries
Rotate through all 14 EVAL_TYPE_OPTIONS before repeating any evalType
Respect content-quality.md: no AI-placeholder names, no alliteration, geographically plausible demographics, no em dashes
